title: iotcALB Trial Specifications
text:
Preface
This is the Trial Specifications Document (TSD) for the Indian Ocean Tuna Commission (IOTC) albacore Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE).

title: 1  Context
text: Background and context for the IOTC albacore MSE.

title: 2  Operating Models
text: Description of the operating models used in the MSE.

title: 3  Management Procedures
text: Description of the candidate management procedures evaluated.

title: 4  Performance Metrics
text: Description of the performance metrics used to evaluate management procedures.
